creator: list1@gjunka.com
text: In the latest versions this issue is happening almost on every page. Even fairly simple pages, i.e. a personal project using a React table, is crashing randomly in about 50% of the time. See also this issue which seems to be reported later on a newer version (probably a duplicate): https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=211202
